title: Harshita Arora Joins YC as General Partner
description: We're thrilled to announce that Harshita Arora is joining Y Combinator as a General Partner.  She brings deep fintech and infrastructure experience, a founder's instinct for product, and the perspective of someone who's been building companies since

title: Adding Canada Back to Our List of Accepted Countries of Incorporation
description: After hearing feedback from Canadian founders in our network, we are adding Canada back to our list of accepted countries of incorporation.

title: Congratulations to EquipmentShare on Going Public
description: Today, EquipmentShare (YC W15) goes public. From Missouri to 373 locations nationwide, they've built the operating system construction has been missing—built by contractors, for contractors. Congrats to Jabbok, Willy, and the EquipmentShare team on a

title: Announcing the YC AI Stack
description: We've partnered with nearly two dozen companies to offer students who attend YC events a suite of over $25,000 in free credits for AI devtools.

title: 2026 Demo Day Dates
description: We’re excited to share the Demo Day dates for 2026 so founders, investors, and our broader community can plan ahead.

title: Meesho Goes Public
description:
Meesho goes public today. From S16 to IPO, they’ve built one of India’s largest e-commerce platforms—empowering millions of small merchants to grow their businesses.

Congrats to Vidit and Sanjeev on a decade of relentless building and listening to u

title: Congratulations to Groww
description: Today, Groww, India's leading digital investing platform, goes public. Tens of millions use Groww to invest simply and confidently in stocks, mutual funds, and ETFs. As YC's first company to list in India, we couldn't be more proud.

title: BillionToOne Goes Public — The Startup That Made Genetic Testing Universal
description: Today, BillionToOne goes public, becoming YC's fourth publicly traded biotech company. More importantly, they have built one of the most important genetic tests in the U.S. Today, 1 in 11 babies born in the US are tested with BillionToOne's fetal gen

title: Meet YC's Newest Visiting Partners
description: We're excited to announce that nine exceptional founders are joining us as Visiting Partners at YC: Matt Riley, Harshita Arora, Grey Baker, Christopher Golda, Raphael Schaad, Christina Gilbert, Francois Chaubard, Vivian Shen, and James Evans.

title: YC x Coinbase RFS: Build Onchain
description:
We are entering the era of Fintech 3.0.

Regulatory clarity, growing consumer adoption, and low-cost chains have paved the way for a golden age of building in crypto — and at YC, Base, and Coinbase, we want to fund builders to seize this moment.

title: Ankit Gupta Joins YC as General Partner, Bringing Deep ML Expertise

title: Dalton Caldwell’s Move to Partner Emeritus

title: Welcoming Jon Xu and Andrew Miklas as YC’s Newest General Partners
description: Over the last few batches, visiting partners Jon Xu and Andrew Miklas have become two of the most trusted voices in the YC community. They were both founders in YC’s Summer 2010 batch, and now, 15 years and two industry-shaping companies later, they’

title: Tyler Bosmeny built Clever into a $500M company–now he’s helping YC founders do the same as General Partner
description: We’re thrilled to welcome Tyler Bosmeny back to YC, this time as a General Partner.

title: Michael Seibel's Legacy Continues at YC: Transition to Partner Emeritus
description: If you’ve been around YC, you know Michael Seibel has been a huge part of it for over a decade. He’s done it all - YC Founder (w07, w12), Group Partner, and Managing Director/CEO of the YC accelerator. Along the way, he’s helped
